panels.description: Whether the Meshtastic node TCP connection is up or down.
panels.title: Node Status

panels.description: Time since the proxy process started.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Number of currently connected proxy clients (iOS, Android, Python CLI, etc.).
panels.title: Active Clients

panels.description: Number of known nodes in the mesh network (from cached NodeInfo).
panels.title: Mesh Nodes

panels.description: Number of frames currently held in the config cache (MyInfo, Config, ModuleConfig, Channel, NodeInfo, ConfigCompleteId).
panels.title: Config Cache Frames

panels.description: Time since the config cache was last populated from the node.
panels.title: Cache Age

panels.description: Meshtastic protocol frames per second in each direction.
panels.title: Frame Rate

panels.description: Bytes per second of Meshtastic traffic in each direction.
panels.title: Byte Rate

panels.description: Cumulative bytes transferred since proxy start.
panels.title: Total Traffic

panels.description: Distribution of proxied Meshtastic messages by application port type.
panels.title: Messages by Type

panels.description: Rate of messages per second broken down by application port type.
panels.title: Message Rate by Type

panels.description: Total messages proxied since start.
panels.title: Total Messages

panels.description: Last received RSSI (Received Signal Strength Indicator) per mesh node. More negative = weaker signal.
panels.title: RSSI per Node

panels.description: Last received SNR (Signal-to-Noise Ratio) per mesh node. Higher = better signal quality.
panels.title: SNR per Node

panels.description: Current signal quality for each mesh node.
panels.title: Signal Quality Table

panels.description: Rate of reconnections to the Meshtastic node. Spikes indicate instability.
panels.title: Reconnect Rate

panels.description: Rate of TCP connection errors to the Meshtastic node.
panels.title: Connection Error Rate

panels.description: Rate of config cache replays to clients by type: full (Python CLI), config_only (iOS phase 1, nonce 69420), nodes_only (iOS phase 2, nonce 69421).
panels.title: Config Replay Rate

panels.description: Total reconnections since proxy start.
panels.title: Reconnects

panels.description: Total connection errors since proxy start.
panels.title: Errors

panels.description: Number of goroutines in the proxy process.
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Process memory usage: RSS (total resident) and Go heap (allocated objects).
panels.title: Memory

panels.description: Time spent in garbage collection per second.
panels.title: GC Duration

panels.description: CPU usage of the proxy process as a fraction of one core.
panels.title: CPU Usage
